protected_core.task_goal: Complete controller/orchestrator hardening so Main can continue automatically across safe waves and stop only on explicit terminal states.
protected_core.expected_output: Verified controller policy/runtime/docs plus a contract-valid closeout checkpoint that preserves current queue truth.
protected_core.current_step: Record controller hardening completion and preserve the explicit-request terminal state in controller truth.
protected_core.resume_point: Stay in WAITING_APPROVAL for Controlled Flag-On Validation until an explicit request arrives or a fresh exact blocker packet forces a new in-scope wave.
hard_constraints: Only controller may emit final ABORT.
Missing evidence fails soft to HOLD or REVIEW, never ABORT.
Do not enable controller flags globally unless explicitly requested.
Do not reopen closed lanes without the required exact blocker packet.
business_invariants: Memphis-only 90 day PoC scope remains frozen.
Instinct8 runtime-hook capability stays additive and default-off.
Controlled flag-on validation is user-request gated.

compaction.halo_summary: Controller hardening is complete. Stage packets now carry full metadata, control-plane truth alignment is enforced before terminal stops, checkpoint truth persists queue state, and the current state remains WAITING_APPROVAL for the explicit-request validation wave.
